facts.claim: Introducing Carnival Jubilee, setting sail from Galveston. Find out what's new aboard, including onboard rollercoaster BOLT™! Explore photos, deck plans, staterooms and itinerary options. Grab your spot on Carnival Jubilee today!
CARNIVAL JUBILEE® SAILS FROM GALVESTON PACKED WITH SUCH FUN & INNOVATION
Carnival Jubilee is a cruise ship built for Carnival Cruise Line.
It was delivered to Carnival on 4 December 2023, and entered service on 23 December 2023 out of the Port of Galveston in the United States.
At 182,015 gross tonnage (GT), Carnival Jubilee is one of the largest cruise ships in the world.
